_comment: Three caption skeletons. Pick one, fill placeholders, pass via --caption-file. Fields story_slug + music_credit are internal-only and stripped by build_caption().

english_short.logline: <one-line hook that lands the joke or insight>

growth_heavy_hashtags._note: Use sparingly — IG penalises spammy tag walls. Keep total <=15.
